title: Gateway Capability Request
description: Provider-neutral capability request crossing the gateway boundary (DEC-0010, INV-PROV-001, INV-TOK-001/002, INV-OBS-001). Carries full run attribution, an inline contract-validated token budget, and the context items with the reason each was loaded. Names no provider, model id, or transcript. The declared data_classification and adapter_id are claims the gateway checks against the active gateway policy — the schema deliberately admits values the policy will reject so rejection is enforced (and testable) at the policy layer, before adapter invocation.

adapter_id.description: gateway adapter identifier; the active policy allowlist decides approval

requested_tier.description: capability tier (docs/MODEL_AND_TOKEN_STRATEGY.md); the active policy decides which tier is permitted

data_classification.description: classification of every input this request carries; the active policy decides which classes are permitted

output_contract.description: artifact type the adapter output must validate against (a contracts/ schema name)

scenario_id.description: deterministic capability/scenario identifier resolved by the adapter

reason.description: why this item is loaded (INV-TOK-002; recorded in the context manifest)

required.description: true: unresolvable item is a typed failure before adapter invocation; false: unresolvable item is recorded as a retrieval failure

token_budget.description: inline token budget, validated against the token-budget contract

max_output_tokens.description: declared maximum output tokens for this invocation; checked against the budget hard stop before invocation

token_budget.basis: offline deterministic fixture run — zero model tokens by construction (DEC-0009)
